name: 大卫·曼努埃尔
name_full: 大卫·曼努埃尔 David Manuele
introduction: David Manuele is a quick-witted, emotionally layered actor whose work lives in the space between boyish mischief and unexpected emotional weight.Whether navigating heartbreak or humor, he roots his performances in truth, vulnerability, and a streak of unpredictable charm.He doesn't perform for attention - he earns it with quiet tension and presence you can't ignore.
